Planted traps (by combo)

healthcare
minimal L1 4 trap(s)
missing_account_type obvious data_quality single_column chart_of_accounts.account_type
CoA row with blank account_type cannot be classified for FS rollup.
Expected finding: Filter chart_of_accounts where account_type is blank.
Row keys: 4000
trap_id: b7f555d53e
future_dated_entry obvious data_quality single_column journal_entries.entry_date
JE dated after fiscal-year end.
Expected finding: Filter journal_entries where entry_date > period_end.
Row keys: JE-2025000043
trap_id: 04402d8c03
negative_debit_or_credit obvious data_quality single_column journal_entries.debit
Debit amount is negative.
Expected finding: Flag debit < 0 in journal_entries.
Row keys: JE-2025000053
trap_id: 9723d997cb
trial_balance_unbalanced obvious data_quality cross_table trial_balance.debit_balance
Sum of debit balances ≠ sum of credit balances.
Expected finding: Compute sum(debit_balance) - sum(credit_balance); flag if non-zero.
Row keys: 6100
trap_id: 9ee38024ea
minimal L2 14 trap(s)
missing_account_type obvious data_quality single_column chart_of_accounts.account_type
CoA row with blank account_type cannot be classified for FS rollup.
Expected finding: Filter chart_of_accounts where account_type is blank.
Row keys: 6200
trap_id: 79b6f8ed50
future_dated_entry obvious data_quality single_column journal_entries.entry_date
JE dated after fiscal-year end.
Expected finding: Filter journal_entries where entry_date > period_end.
Row keys: JE-2025000081
trap_id: 9ac80dd098
backdated_entry moderate control_weakness cross_column journal_entries.posted_at
posted_at timestamp far later than entry_date (retro-active posting).
Expected finding: Flag entries where posted_at - entry_date > 7 days.
Row keys: JE-2025000055
trap_id: da0c48015d
mixed_date_formats moderate data_quality single_column journal_entries.entry_date
Some entry_date values in MM/DD/YYYY format alongside ISO YYYY-MM-DD.
Expected finding: Detect rows where entry_date doesn't match ^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$.
Row keys: JE-2025000026, JE-2025000076, JE-2025000044, JE-2025000082, JE-2025000060
trap_id: a3e91e4d5b
excel_serial_dates moderate data_quality single_column journal_entries.entry_date
Some entry_date values are Excel serial integers (e.g., '45678').
Expected finding: Detect numeric-only strings in entry_date.
Row keys: JE-2025000063, JE-2025000039, JE-2025000026
trap_id: 35e5a3b705
period_13 moderate control_weakness single_column journal_entries.accounting_period
Entries posted to accounting_period 13 (year-end adjustment indicator).
Expected finding: Filter journal_entries where accounting_period > 12.
Row keys: JE-2025000081, JE-2025000052, JE-2025000058
trap_id: 8dbdc8ca72
entry_outside_fiscal_year moderate data_quality cross_period journal_entries.entry_date
Entries dated before fiscal-year start present in the current FY ledger.
Expected finding: Filter journal_entries where entry_date < period_start.
Row keys: JE-2025000067, JE-2025000085
trap_id: bca783357d
negative_debit_or_credit obvious data_quality single_column journal_entries.debit
Debit amount is negative.
Expected finding: Flag debit < 0 in journal_entries.
Row keys: JE-2025000037
trap_id: 4045883835
sign_flip_credit_as_negative_debit moderate data_quality cross_column journal_entries.debit
Credit posted as negative debit instead of positive credit; nets correctly but inflates row count.
Expected finding: Identify journal_entries.debit < 0 paired with same-amount positive credit elsewhere.
Row keys: JE-2025000064R
trap_id: 7b53426187
unbalanced_je moderate control_weakness cross_column journal_entries.debit/credit
Debit and credit legs of an entry_id don't tie.
Expected finding: Group by entry_id; sum(debit) != sum(credit).
Row keys: JE-2025000082
trap_id: 9f8bd88f02
trial_balance_unbalanced obvious data_quality cross_table trial_balance.debit_balance
Sum of debit balances ≠ sum of credit balances.
Expected finding: Compute sum(debit_balance) - sum(credit_balance); flag if non-zero.
Row keys: 1510
trap_id: 9ed179adf3
manual_je_no_supporting_doc moderate control_weakness single_column journal_entries.attachment_ref
Manual JE without attachment_ref.
Expected finding: Filter journal_entries.je_type='manual' AND attachment_ref blank.
Row keys: JE-2025000072, JE-2025000029, JE-2025000078, JE-2025000071, JE-2025000067
trap_id: d44ab2d6ed
recurring_je_flagged_manual moderate control_weakness single_column journal_entries.je_type
Recurring monthly accrual posted as manual one-off (bypass-control signal).
Expected finding: Cluster JEs by memo+amount+account_id; flag repeated patterns posted with je_type='manual'.
Row keys: JE-2025000059, JE-2025000042, JE-2025000003
trap_id: 820a079095

Expected finding: Regex check ap_invoices.invoice_date against ^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$.
Row keys: BILL-2025000038
trap_id: 41b1c36280
embedded_delimiter moderate data_quality single_column vendors.vendor_name
Field contains a comma — survives via CSV quoting but breaks downstream non-quoting parsers.
Expected finding: Look for ',' in vendor_name; verify all CSV consumers honor RFC 4180 quoting.
Row keys: VEND-00021
trap_id: 271de42472
schema_drift_mid_file obvious data_quality single_column ap_invoices.drift_extra_col
Extra column appears in some rows only — schema drift signal.
Expected finding: Compare row column counts; flag rows with non-empty values in unexpected columns.
Row keys: BILL-2025000107
trap_id: 3ff7fdccde
numeric_locale_leak moderate data_quality single_column ap_invoices.amount
Some amounts formatted with thousand separators ('1,234.56'); others bare floats.
Expected finding: Detect non-numeric chars in amount column; coerce and audit failures.
Row keys: BILL-2025000218, BILL-2025000083, BILL-2025000043
trap_id: bca358914c
basic L3 91 trap(s)
missing_tax_id obvious control_weakness single_column vendors.tax_id
Vendor record has empty tax_id; 1099/W-9 control gap.
Expected finding: Filter vendors where tax_id is blank.
Row keys: VEND-00026
trap_id: e4d5cb72c6
missing_account_type obvious data_quality single_column chart_of_accounts.account_type
CoA row with blank account_type cannot be classified for FS rollup.
Expected finding: Filter chart_of_accounts where account_type is blank.
Row keys: 1000
trap_id: 1e2e88531c
missing_approver obvious control_weakness single_column ap_invoices.approved_by
AP bill posted with empty approved_by — control gap.
Expected finding: Filter ap_invoices where approved_by is blank.
Row keys: BILL-2025000203
trap_id: e53e0187df
missing_currency_code obvious data_quality single_column ar_invoices.currency
Invoice amount with no currency; downstream FX defaults silently.
Expected finding: Filter ar_invoices where currency is blank.
Row keys: INV-2025000338
trap_id: 970102232e
missing_po_on_material_invoice moderate control_weakness cross_column ap_invoices.po_number
Material AP invoice booked without a PO reference (3-way-match gap).
Expected finding: ap_invoices.amount > threshold AND po_number blank.
Row keys: BILL-2025000156
trap_id: f390cadd05
missing_invoice_date obvious data_quality single_column ar_invoices.invoice_date
AR invoice with blank invoice_date breaks aging.
Expected finding: Filter ar_invoices where invoice_date is blank.
Row keys: INV-2025000233
trap_id: 0067f2852e
missing_customer_id_on_invoice obvious data_quality cross_table ar_invoices.customer_id
Invoice with empty customer_id (orphan revenue).
Expected finding: Filter ar_invoices where customer_id is blank.
Row keys: INV-2025000096
trap_id: 9f13321981
missing_payment_terms moderate data_quality single_column vendors.payment_terms
Vendor record without payment terms defaults to immediate-pay.
Expected finding: Filter vendors where payment_terms is blank.
Row keys: VEND-00039
trap_id: d49be762e6
incomplete_address_block obvious data_quality single_column vendors.state
Vendor with country set but state+zip blank (tax/shipping impact).
Expected finding: Filter vendors where country is set and state or zip_code is blank.
Row keys: VEND-00013
trap_id: 79fc86e76a
truncated_description subtle data_quality single_column ap_invoices.attachment_ref
Multiple distinct rows share the same 19-character description — silent fixed-width truncation.
Expected finding: Group attachment_ref by length; flag identical-length collisions across distinct rows.
Row keys: BILL-2025000185, BILL-2025000098, BILL-2025000186
trap_id: cf8deebedd
duplicate_vendor_variant moderate control_weakness cross_column vendors.vendor_name
Two vendor rows with near-identical name + same bank_account_last4.
Expected finding: Fuzzy-match vendor_name within identical bank_account_last4.
Row keys: VEND-00011, VEND-00041
trap_id: 4ff56f9420
same_entity_split_ids subtle control_weakness cross_column vendors.tax_id
Two distinct vendor_ids share identical tax_id (same real-world entity).
Expected finding: Group vendors by tax_id; flag groups with >1 vendor_id.
Row keys: VEND-00014, VEND-00042
trap_id: df843f36a8
misspelled_entity_name moderate data_quality single_column vendors.vendor_name
Vendor name has a transposition typo vs. its canonical form.
Expected finding: Fuzzy/Levenshtein match across vendor_name.
Row keys: VEND-00017
trap_id: a3c98f277c
case_whitespace_variants moderate data_quality single_column vendors.vendor_name
Same name with different case + leading/trailing whitespace stored as distinct rows.
Expected finding: Normalize vendor_name (trim + lower) and group; flag duplicates.
Row keys: VEND-00004, VEND-00043
trap_id: 38553e2cca
unicode_homoglyphs subtle control_weakness single_column vendors.vendor_name
Cyrillic homoglyph substituted in vendor name (sanctions-screening bypass).
Expected finding: Check vendor_name for non-Latin Unicode codepoints in otherwise ASCII names.
Row keys: VEND-00016, VEND-00044
trap_id: 793d0324f1
confidential_masked_name subtle control_weakness cross_table vendors.vendor_name
Multiple vendor rows masked as 'Confidential' — hides related-party patterns.
Expected finding: Filter vendors where vendor_name in {'Confidential','Vendor #1',...}; cross-join to ap_invoices for activity.
Row keys: VEND-00029, VEND-00006, VEND-00008
trap_id: 28106fddc8
name_in_wrong_field moderate data_quality single_column vendors.vendor_name
Address in name field; entity name in address field (data-entry swap).
Expected finding: Regex check: vendor_name matches street-address pattern.
Row keys: VEND-00020
trap_id: 5f8bf3c0e1
inconsistent_abbreviation moderate data_quality single_column vendors.vendor_name
Same suffix represented 3 ways (Inc / Inc. / Incorporated).
Expected finding: Normalize legal suffixes before dedup.
Row keys: VEND-00012, VEND-00004, VEND-00029
trap_id: c7f5e2a48a
merged_name_field moderate data_quality single_column payroll_summary.employee_name

Row keys: EMP-00019, EMP-00011
trap_id: 9de8f0cda8
future_dated_entry obvious data_quality single_column journal_entries.entry_date
JE dated after fiscal-year end.
Expected finding: Filter journal_entries where entry_date > period_end.

trap_id: 9a74de728f
backdated_entry moderate control_weakness cross_column journal_entries.posted_at
posted_at timestamp far later than entry_date (retro-active posting).
Expected finding: Flag entries where posted_at - entry_date > 7 days.
Row keys: JE-2025000670
trap_id: d02002d860
due_before_invoice obvious data_quality single_column ar_invoices.due_date
Invoice due_date precedes invoice_date.
Expected finding: Filter ar_invoices where due_date < invoice_date.
Row keys: INV-2025000371
trap_id: 4d79e513ce
mixed_date_formats moderate data_quality single_column journal_entries.entry_date
Some entry_date values in MM/DD/YYYY format alongside ISO YYYY-MM-DD.
Expected finding: Detect rows where entry_date doesn't match ^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$.

trap_id: bc9a7d8d92
excel_serial_dates moderate data_quality single_column journal_entries.entry_date
Some entry_date values are Excel serial integers (e.g., '45678').
Expected finding: Detect numeric-only strings in entry_date.
Row keys: JE-2025001180, JE-2025000513, JE-2025000503
trap_id: 84c6ccb706
mm_dd_vs_dd_mm_collision subtle material_misstatement single_column ar_invoices.invoice_date
DD/MM/YYYY-formatted dates mixed with MM/DD/YYYY; ambiguous interpretation.
Expected finding: Detect non-ISO date strings; cross-check against vendor/customer locale.
Row keys: INV-2025000392, INV-2025000163, INV-2025000043, INV-2025000176
trap_id: 530fc3a22d
period_13 moderate control_weakness single_column journal_entries.accounting_period
Entries posted to accounting_period 13 (year-end adjustment indicator).

trap_id: 6f3c2c60c5
entry_outside_fiscal_year moderate data_quality cross_period journal_entries.entry_date
Entries dated before fiscal-year start present in the current FY ledger.
Expected finding: Filter journal_entries where entry_date < period_start.

trap_id: 21f8fdf0ab
weekend_holiday_posting subtle control_weakness cross_column journal_entries.posted_at
Material JEs posted on US federal holidays.

Row keys: JE-2025000569, JE-2025000119, JE-2025000192
trap_id: 236a876dd5
posted_at_unusual_hour subtle control_weakness cross_column journal_entries.posted_at
Interactive-user JE posted between 02:00 and 05:00 local time.
Expected finding: Extract hour from posted_at; flag 02:00–05:00 except 'system_batch' user.
Row keys: JE-2025000139, JE-2025000739, JE-2025000218, JE-2025000641

currency_mixing_unconverted moderate material_misstatement cross_column ar_invoices.currency

trap_id: a85998aa3e
implied_decimal_cents_vs_dollars subtle material_misstatement single_column ap_invoices.amount

Row keys: BILL-2025000168, BILL-2025000004, BILL-2025000102

cookie_jar_reserve subtle material_misstatement cross_period journal_entries.memo

mixed_units moderate data_quality single_column inventory_items.unit

wrong_data_type moderate data_quality single_column ap_invoices.amount

trap_id: 8803a2ff05

mojibake_encoding moderate data_quality single_column vendors.vendor_name

trap_id: 49a841c9c7
case_whitespace_variants moderate data_quality single_column vendors.vendor_name

wrong_data_type moderate data_quality single_column ap_invoices.amount

trap_id: 5544a6e028
orphan_foreign_key moderate data_quality cross_table ar_invoices.customer_id

Row keys: INV-2025000384
trap_id: 49b50f56f9
cascading_invalidation moderate data_quality cross_table vendors.vendor_id

trap_id: 3afc48fd75
mojibake_encoding moderate data_quality single_column vendors.vendor_name

column_shift_header_mismatch obvious data_quality single_column ap_invoices.invoice_date

trap_id: 1bac3a6f9a
embedded_delimiter moderate data_quality single_column vendors.vendor_name

trap_id: c6567f8706

trap_id: 53974a4090

trap_id: c9e63e23e5
case_whitespace_variants moderate data_quality single_column vendors.vendor_name

revenue_before_shipment subtle material_misstatement cross_table ar_invoices.shipment_date
AR invoice dated before shipment_date — revenue booked pre-delivery.
Expected finding: Filter ar_invoices where invoice_date < shipment_date.
Row keys: INV-2025000320, INV-2025000229, INV-2025000299, INV-2025000268
trap_id: b213d8b21d
revenue_after_period subtle material_misstatement cross_period ar_invoices.invoice_date
Invoice dated subsequent period but in current-period AR roll.
Expected finding: Filter ar_invoices where invoice_date > period_end.
Row keys: INV-2025000229, INV-2025000298
trap_id: c8225540f3
inventory_in_transit_double_booked subtle material_misstatement cross_period inventory_items.status
Inventory marked in_transit AND included in on_hand_qty (FOB cutoff).
Expected finding: Filter inventory_items where status='in_transit' AND on_hand_qty > 0.
Row keys: SKU-000076, SKU-000012, SKU-000018
trap_id: e6914396fa
ap_cutoff_unaccrued subtle material_misstatement cross_period ap_invoices.invoice_date
Bills dated immediately pre-cutoff still 'open' — likely unaccrued for AP.
Expected finding: Filter ap_invoices where invoice_date in [period_end-3, period_end] AND status='open'.
Row keys: BILL-2025000129, BILL-2025000156, BILL-2025000179
trap_id: 3c171fd8b7
bill_and_hold_no_docs subtle material_misstatement cross_column ar_invoices.memo
Revenue with bill-and-hold memo but no shipment.
Expected finding: Filter ar_invoices where memo LIKE '%bill-and-hold%' AND shipment_date blank.
Row keys: INV-2025000351, INV-2025000354
trap_id: d6e5e5cdee
side_letter_evidence subtle control_weakness single_column journal_entries.memo
Memo field references 'side letter' or 'verbal agreement'.
Expected finding: Regex search memo for 'side letter|verbal agreement|gentleman's agreement'.
Row keys: JE-2025000539, JE-2025000854
trap_id: 4494cab363
round_tripping subtle material_misstatement cross_table ap_invoices.amount
AR sale and AP purchase of identical amount with same counterparty within days.
Expected finding: Match ar_invoices to ap_invoices on (amount, week, customer/vendor sharing name).
Row keys: INV-2025000168, BILL-ROUNDTRIP-2246
trap_id: aca5224b40
round_dollar_terminated_user subtle material_misstatement cross_table journal_entries.posted_by
Round-dollar JEs near year-end posted by user whose termination_date precedes entry_date.
Expected finding: Join journal_entries.posted_by==payroll_summary.username; flag entry_date > termination_date.
Row keys: JE-2025900000, JE-2025900001, JE-2025900002, JE-2025900003
trap_id: d6005537c2
new_vendor_paid_within_24h subtle control_weakness cross_table ap_invoices.vendor_id
Vendor created and paid within 24 hours (control-weakness signal).
Expected finding: Filter ap_invoices where date_diff(invoice_date, vendors.created_at) < 1 day.
Row keys: VEND-FAST-001, BILL-FAST-001
trap_id: c25d4516ed
vendor_address_matches_employee subtle material_misstatement cross_table vendors.address_line_1
Vendor address matches an active employee's address (related-party risk).
Expected finding: Join vendors to payroll_summary on (address_line_1, city, state, zip_code).
Row keys: VEND-00013, EMP-00004
trap_id: 8a3d94adcd
vendor_bank_matches_employee subtle material_misstatement cross_table vendors.bank_account_last4
Vendor bank account last4 matches an employee's payroll bank (kickback risk).
Expected finding: Inner-join vendors.bank_account_last4 to payroll_summary.bank_account_last4.
Row keys: VEND-00033, EMP-00008
trap_id: d66075250e
vendor_phone_matches_employee subtle control_weakness cross_table vendors.phone
Vendor phone matches employee phone.
Expected finding: Inner-join vendors.phone to payroll_summary.phone.
Row keys: VEND-00034, EMP-00010
trap_id: 312caa46d9
ghost_employee subtle material_misstatement cross_table payroll_summary.employee_id
Active employee paid YTD with no journal_entries posting activity (posted_by) and no access logs.
Expected finding: Compare payroll_summary.employee_id to journal_entries.posted_by, system_access_logs.user_id.
Row keys: EMP-GHOST-01
trap_id: 5f087895c4
phantom_inventory_in_transit subtle material_misstatement cross_period inventory_items.status
SKUs flagged in_transit with last_received_date > 1 year ago.
Expected finding: Filter inventory_items.status='in_transit' AND date_diff(today, last_received_date) > 365.
Row keys: SKU-000100, SKU-000082, SKU-000008, SKU-000026, SKU-000108
trap_id: cd73fb5911
channel_stuffing_q4_returns_q1 subtle material_misstatement cross_period ar_invoices.amount
Q1 returns spike (negative-amount invoices) following Q4 sales surge.
Expected finding: Compare net AR by quarter; flag Q1 returns rate disproportionate to Q4 sales.
Row keys: INV-2025000012, INV-2025000205, INV-2025000136, INV-2025000321, INV-2025000038
trap_id: aae64c36cb
cookie_jar_reserve subtle material_misstatement cross_period journal_entries.memo
Allowance-for-doubtful adjustments oscillate quarterly in counter-cyclical pattern.
Expected finding: Track 1105 movements by quarter; flag oscillation signs alternating with no underlying AR trigger.
Row keys: JE-CJR-2025-03-31, JE-CJR-2025-06-30, JE-CJR-2025-09-30, JE-CJR-2025-12-31
trap_id: ae44367b8e
unusual_je_pair subtle control_weakness cross_column journal_entries.account_id
Debit/credit account-type pair (equity → revenue) never seen elsewhere in the ledger.
Expected finding: Build pair frequency of (debit_account_type, credit_account_type); flag low-frequency pairs.
Row keys: JE-UNUSUAL-6186
trap_id: cab60afcb8
mixed_units moderate data_quality single_column inventory_items.unit
Same column has mixed units (ea/kg/lb/ml/oz).
Expected finding: Inspect distinct values in inventory_items.unit.
Row keys: SKU-000097, SKU-000083, SKU-000031
trap_id: 12122ea4b3
wrong_data_type moderate data_quality single_column ap_invoices.amount
Amount column has string-typed values mixed with floats.
Expected finding: pd.to_numeric(errors='coerce'); flag NaN coercions.
Row keys: BILL-2025000198, BILL-2025000002, BILL-2025000054
trap_id: 5544a6e028
orphan_foreign_key moderate data_quality cross_table ar_invoices.customer_id

Row keys: INV-2025000073
trap_id: 4c2b5a635e
cascading_invalidation moderate data_quality cross_table vendors.vendor_id

Row keys: VEND-00025
trap_id: 3afc48fd75
mojibake_encoding moderate data_quality single_column vendors.vendor_name

trap_id: d9530c8f44
column_shift_header_mismatch obvious data_quality single_column ap_invoices.invoice_date

Row keys: BILL-2025000041
trap_id: 4257b9ec67
embedded_delimiter moderate data_quality single_column vendors.vendor_name

trap_id: 1d9d15145e

trap_id: 2cd3c422f9

trap_id: b9f2550d45

trap_id: 0e1bc2a876

trap_id: 5f01361269

trap_id: 1178f0d4cd

trap_id: 3b59eb6781

Row keys: JE-2025900000, JE-2025900001, JE-2025900002, JE-2025900003
trap_id: cbd2266eb5
new_vendor_paid_within_24h subtle control_weakness cross_table ap_invoices.vendor_id
Vendor created and paid within 24 hours (control-weakness signal).
Expected finding: Filter ap_invoices where date_diff(invoice_date, vendors.created_at) < 1 day.
Row keys: VEND-FAST-001, BILL-FAST-001
trap_id: be67fd6905
vendor_address_matches_employee subtle material_misstatement cross_table vendors.address_line_1
Vendor address matches an active employee's address (related-party risk).
Expected finding: Join vendors to payroll_summary on (address_line_1, city, state, zip_code).
Row keys: VEND-00128, EMP-00019
trap_id: fd6a1675f8
vendor_bank_matches_employee subtle material_misstatement cross_table vendors.bank_account_last4
Vendor bank account last4 matches an employee's payroll bank (kickback risk).
Expected finding: Inner-join vendors.bank_account_last4 to payroll_summary.bank_account_last4.
Row keys: VEND-00053, EMP-00090
trap_id: 4fb7acdccb
vendor_phone_matches_employee subtle control_weakness cross_table vendors.phone
Vendor phone matches employee phone.
Expected finding: Inner-join vendors.phone to payroll_summary.phone.
Row keys: VEND-00114, EMP-00014
trap_id: 1be8e766a5
ghost_employee subtle material_misstatement cross_table payroll_summary.employee_id
Active employee paid YTD with no journal_entries posting activity (posted_by) and no access logs.
Expected finding: Compare payroll_summary.employee_id to journal_entries.posted_by, system_access_logs.user_id.
Row keys: EMP-GHOST-01
trap_id: 43182310a4
phantom_inventory_in_transit subtle material_misstatement cross_period inventory_items.status
SKUs flagged in_transit with last_received_date > 1 year ago.
Expected finding: Filter inventory_items.status='in_transit' AND date_diff(today, last_received_date) > 365.
Row keys: SKU-000597, SKU-000059, SKU-000275, SKU-000562, SKU-000595
trap_id: 292d08234f
channel_stuffing_q4_returns_q1 subtle material_misstatement cross_period ar_invoices.amount
Q1 returns spike (negative-amount invoices) following Q4 sales surge.
Expected finding: Compare net AR by quarter; flag Q1 returns rate disproportionate to Q4 sales.
Row keys: INV-2025001651, INV-2025001300, INV-2025001199, INV-2025002220, INV-2025001473
trap_id: b481b1a92e
cookie_jar_reserve subtle material_misstatement cross_period journal_entries.memo
Allowance-for-doubtful adjustments oscillate quarterly in counter-cyclical pattern.
Expected finding: Track 1105 movements by quarter; flag oscillation signs alternating with no underlying AR trigger.
Row keys: JE-CJR-2025-03-31, JE-CJR-2025-06-30, JE-CJR-2025-09-30, JE-CJR-2025-12-31
trap_id: 95b5e78704
unusual_je_pair subtle control_weakness cross_column journal_entries.account_id
Debit/credit account-type pair (equity → revenue) never seen elsewhere in the ledger.
Expected finding: Build pair frequency of (debit_account_type, credit_account_type); flag low-frequency pairs.
Row keys: JE-UNUSUAL-8889
trap_id: 61304e6152
mixed_units moderate data_quality single_column inventory_items.unit
Same column has mixed units (ea/kg/lb/ml/oz).
Expected finding: Inspect distinct values in inventory_items.unit.
Row keys: SKU-000364, SKU-000544, SKU-000543
trap_id: 5ec62ce27f
wrong_data_type moderate data_quality single_column ap_invoices.amount
Amount column has string-typed values mixed with floats.
Expected finding: pd.to_numeric(errors='coerce'); flag NaN coercions.
Row keys: BILL-2025000689, BILL-2025001181, BILL-2025000089
trap_id: 2cd3c422f9
orphan_foreign_key moderate data_quality cross_table ar_invoices.customer_id
Invoice references a customer_id absent from customers.
Expected finding: Left-anti-join ar_invoices to customers on customer_id.
Row keys: INV-2025001623
trap_id: 0419b53ccb
cascading_invalidation moderate data_quality cross_table vendors.vendor_id
Vendor deleted from master but child bills remain referencing the orphaned vendor_id.
Expected finding: Left-anti-join ap_invoices to vendors on vendor_id.
Row keys: VEND-00149
trap_id: 0e1bc2a876
mojibake_encoding moderate data_quality single_column vendors.vendor_name
Names contain mojibake (UTF-8 mis-decoded as latin-1).

Row keys: VEND-00107, VEND-00072, VEND-00131
trap_id: 240df33272
column_shift_header_mismatch obvious data_quality single_column ap_invoices.invoice_date

Expected finding: Regex check ap_invoices.invoice_date against ^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$.
Row keys: BILL-2025000420
trap_id: 806aec3824
embedded_delimiter moderate data_quality single_column vendors.vendor_name
Field contains a comma — survives via CSV quoting but breaks downstream non-quoting parsers.

Row keys: VEND-00091
trap_id: c3f7bb8dab
schema_drift_mid_file obvious data_quality single_column ap_invoices.drift_extra_col

Row keys: BILL-2025000670

numeric_locale_leak moderate data_quality single_column ap_invoices.amount

Row keys: BILL-2025001103, BILL-2025000313, BILL-2025000606
trap_id: ea734c954e
silent_record_truncation subtle material_misstatement cross_period ar_invoices

Expected finding: Normalize legal suffixes before dedup.
Row keys: VEND-00026, VEND-00002, VEND-00024
trap_id: a7211b4bf4
merged_name_field moderate data_quality single_column payroll_summary.employee_name
Some rows formatted 'Last, First' while others are 'First Last'.
Expected finding: Detect comma in employee_name; standardize before joining.
Row keys: EMP-00009, EMP-00005
trap_id: 00fbb0ce9c
future_dated_entry obvious data_quality single_column journal_entries.entry_date
JE dated after fiscal-year end.
Expected finding: Filter journal_entries where entry_date > period_end.
Row keys: JE-2025000413
trap_id: 7657c01eb5
backdated_entry moderate control_weakness cross_column journal_entries.posted_at
posted_at timestamp far later than entry_date (retro-active posting).
Expected finding: Flag entries where posted_at - entry_date > 7 days.
Row keys: JE-2025000568
trap_id: c3fb87174b
due_before_invoice obvious data_quality single_column ar_invoices.due_date
Invoice due_date precedes invoice_date.
Expected finding: Filter ar_invoices where due_date < invoice_date.
Row keys: INV-2025000106
trap_id: 68d4f76b7e
mixed_date_formats moderate data_quality single_column journal_entries.entry_date
Some entry_date values in MM/DD/YYYY format alongside ISO YYYY-MM-DD.
Expected finding: Detect rows where entry_date doesn't match ^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$.
Row keys: JE-2025000345, JE-2025000689, JE-2025001170, JE-2025000185, JE-2025000266
trap_id: 51f13aa277
excel_serial_dates moderate data_quality single_column journal_entries.entry_date
Some entry_date values are Excel serial integers (e.g., '45678').
Expected finding: Detect numeric-only strings in entry_date.
Row keys: JE-2025000529, JE-2025000820, JE-2025000946
trap_id: e0f79acfdd
period_13 moderate control_weakness single_column journal_entries.accounting_period
Entries posted to accounting_period 13 (year-end adjustment indicator).
Expected finding: Filter journal_entries where accounting_period > 12.
Row keys: JE-2025000842, JE-2025000506, JE-2025000908
trap_id: 0cbf8f8497
entry_outside_fiscal_year moderate data_quality cross_period journal_entries.entry_date
Entries dated before fiscal-year start present in the current FY ledger.
Expected finding: Filter journal_entries where entry_date < period_start.
Row keys: JE-2025000231, JE-2025000552
trap_id: 7fbb7bd69e
negative_debit_or_credit obvious data_quality single_column journal_entries.debit
Debit amount is negative.
Expected finding: Flag debit < 0 in journal_entries.
Row keys: JE-2025000317
trap_id: 4d9e80bf81
currency_mixing_unconverted moderate material_misstatement cross_column ar_invoices.currency
EUR-denominated invoices mixed with USD; amounts not converted.
Expected finding: Group ar_invoices by currency; flag any non-base currency without FX adjustment.
Row keys: INV-2025000350, INV-2025000206, INV-2025000180, INV-2025000156, INV-2025000238
trap_id: 70cf700471
comma_decimal_european moderate data_quality single_column ap_invoices.invoice_number
Invoice references use comma-as-decimal alongside dot-as-decimal.
Expected finding: Detect ',' in invoice_number followed by 2 digits.
Row keys: BILL-2025000146, BILL-2025000209, BILL-2025000017
trap_id: d8ae1877d6
scientific_notation_leak moderate data_quality single_column ap_invoices.invoice_number
Numeric-looking string fields contain scientific notation.
Expected finding: Regex check for E+/E- in string columns.
Row keys: BILL-2025000100, BILL-2025000072
trap_id: 2fd9270084
sign_flip_credit_as_negative_debit moderate data_quality cross_column journal_entries.debit
Credit posted as negative debit instead of positive credit; nets correctly but inflates row count.
Expected finding: Identify journal_entries.debit < 0 paired with same-amount positive credit elsewhere.
Row keys: JE-2025001002R
trap_id: b2404f8cb3
unbalanced_je moderate control_weakness cross_column journal_entries.debit/credit
Debit and credit legs of an entry_id don't tie.
Expected finding: Group by entry_id; sum(debit) != sum(credit).
Row keys: JE-2025000397
trap_id: ae8c9796a3
subledger_to_gl_break moderate material_misstatement cross_table trial_balance.debit_balance
AR sub-ledger total ≠ AR control account balance.
Expected finding: Compare sum(ar_invoices.balance) to trial_balance.debit_balance where account_id=AR control.
Row keys: 1100
trap_id: 4f0d17b9ba
aging_sum_mismatch moderate control_weakness cross_column ar_aging.total
AR aging buckets don't sum to total.
Expected finding: Check current + d_1_30 + ... + over_90 == total.
Row keys: CUST-00060
trap_id: 6d16c1ccac
trial_balance_unbalanced obvious data_quality cross_table trial_balance.debit_balance
Sum of debit balances ≠ sum of credit balances.
Expected finding: Compute sum(debit_balance) - sum(credit_balance); flag if non-zero.
Row keys: 6400
trap_id: ba3ef55662
inventory_perpetual_vs_periodic moderate control_weakness cross_table inventory_items.on_hand_qty
Perpetual on_hand_qty has been adjusted; differs from physical count.
Expected finding: Compare inventory_items.on_hand_qty to historical receipt/issue activity.
Row keys: SKU-000008, SKU-000114, SKU-000061
trap_id: ae32d23d79
payroll_summary_vs_gl moderate control_weakness cross_table payroll_summary.ytd_gross_pay
Sum of YTD gross pay no longer matches GL salary expense.
Expected finding: Sum payroll_summary.ytd_gross_pay; compare to journal_entries.debit on salary accounts.
Row keys: EMP-00013
trap_id: 74b64ac26b
ap_no_receipt moderate control_weakness cross_table ap_invoices.attachment_ref
Material AP invoices paid with no attached receiving document.
Expected finding: Filter ap_invoices.status='paid', amount>threshold, attachment_ref blank.
Row keys: BILL-2025000051, BILL-2025000097, BILL-2025000201
trap_id: cd7ed19d1b
qty_received_ne_invoiced moderate material_misstatement cross_table purchase_orders.qty
PO qty inflated post-receipt; bills priced at receipt-qty mismatch.
Expected finding: Compare purchase_orders.qty to receipt records (when present).
Row keys: PO-100038, PO-100092, PO-100001
trap_id: ce039f2a8b
price_invoiced_ne_po moderate material_misstatement cross_table purchase_orders.unit_price
PO unit price raised post-issuance vs. supporting invoice.
Expected finding: Compare purchase_orders.unit_price to ap_invoices.amount / qty for same PO.
Row keys: PO-100006, PO-100097, PO-100052
trap_id: d087bd905c
manual_je_no_supporting_doc moderate control_weakness single_column journal_entries.attachment_ref
Manual JE without attachment_ref.
Expected finding: Filter journal_entries.je_type='manual' AND attachment_ref blank.
Row keys: JE-2025000168, JE-2025000656, JE-2025000951, JE-2025000923, JE-2025000318
trap_id: 17706a75ac
recurring_je_flagged_manual moderate control_weakness single_column journal_entries.je_type
Recurring monthly accrual posted as manual one-off (bypass-control signal).
Expected finding: Cluster JEs by memo+amount+account_id; flag repeated patterns posted with je_type='manual'.
Row keys: JE-2025000555, JE-2025000528, JE-2025000821
trap_id: 4626e72442
future_hire_date_active moderate control_weakness cross_column payroll_summary.hire_date
Active employee with hire_date in the future but YTD gross pay > 0.
Expected finding: Filter is_active=True AND hire_date > period_end AND ytd_gross_pay > 0.
Row keys: EMP-00003
trap_id: e2ef7993f7
duplicate_invoice_number_same_vendor moderate material_misstatement cross_column ap_invoices.invoice_number
Two bills with the same (vendor_id, invoice_number) — duplicate payment risk.
Expected finding: Group by (vendor_id, invoice_number); flag groups with >1 bill_id.
Row keys: BILL-2025000163, BILL-DUP-3982
trap_id: 4eafb71458
duplicate_customer moderate data_quality cross_column customers.tax_id
Two customer rows with identical tax_id and email.
Expected finding: Group customers by (tax_id) or (email); flag duplicates.
Row keys: CUST-00063, CUST-DUP-4981
trap_id: cb81515018
zero_amount_open_invoice obvious data_quality single_column ap_invoices.amount
AP invoice has zero amount but open status.
Expected finding: Filter ap_invoices where amount=0 AND status='open'.
Row keys: BILL-2025000126
trap_id: 4ae0c196a4
negative_inventory obvious data_quality single_column inventory_items.on_hand_qty
Physical on-hand quantity is negative.
Expected finding: Filter inventory_items where on_hand_qty < 0.
Row keys: SKU-000022
trap_id: bd12df63da
dormant_account_activity moderate control_weakness cross_period chart_of_accounts.is_active
Account flagged inactive but has current-period JE activity.
Expected finding: Left-join CoA.is_active=False to journal_entries; flag matches.
Row keys: 6100
trap_id: 0c7e750269
sales_cutoff_spike moderate control_weakness cross_column ar_invoices.invoice_date
Concentrated, oversized invoices in final 3 days of FY.
Expected finding: Histogram invoice_date in last 5 days; compare amount to running median.
Row keys: INV-2025000335, INV-2025000106, INV-2025000160, INV-2025000350, INV-2025000075, INV-2025000117

mixed_units moderate data_quality single_column inventory_items.unit
Same column has mixed units (ea/kg/lb/ml/oz).
Expected finding: Inspect distinct values in inventory_items.unit.
Row keys: SKU-000084, SKU-000041, SKU-000098
trap_id: 233239ee81
wrong_data_type moderate data_quality single_column ap_invoices.amount
Amount column has string-typed values mixed with floats.
Expected finding: pd.to_numeric(errors='coerce'); flag NaN coercions.
Row keys: BILL-2025000079, BILL-2025000165, BILL-2025000036
trap_id: 8a87da6f3f
orphan_foreign_key moderate data_quality cross_table ar_invoices.customer_id
Invoice references a customer_id absent from customers.
Expected finding: Left-anti-join ar_invoices to customers on customer_id.
Row keys: INV-2025000156
trap_id: 3354512900
cascading_invalidation moderate data_quality cross_table vendors.vendor_id
Vendor deleted from master but child bills remain referencing the orphaned vendor_id.
Expected finding: Left-anti-join ap_invoices to vendors on vendor_id.
Row keys: VEND-00013
trap_id: 072eedbd51
mojibake_encoding moderate data_quality single_column vendors.vendor_name
Names contain mojibake (UTF-8 mis-decoded as latin-1).

Row keys: VEND-00035, VEND-00027, VEND-00018
trap_id: c71fea392f
column_shift_header_mismatch obvious data_quality single_column ap_invoices.invoice_date

Row keys: BILL-2025000187
trap_id: 9e084a2d67
embedded_delimiter moderate data_quality single_column vendors.vendor_name
Field contains a comma — survives via CSV quoting but breaks downstream non-quoting parsers.
Expected finding: Look for ',' in vendor_name; verify all CSV consumers honor RFC 4180 quoting.
Row keys: VEND-00031
trap_id: 8466343ba5
schema_drift_mid_file obvious data_quality single_column ap_invoices.drift_extra_col
Extra column appears in some rows only — schema drift signal.
Expected finding: Compare row column counts; flag rows with non-empty values in unexpected columns.
Row keys: BILL-2025000168
trap_id: 7144b935b1
numeric_locale_leak moderate data_quality single_column ap_invoices.amount
Some amounts formatted with thousand separators ('1,234.56'); others bare floats.
Expected finding: Detect non-numeric chars in amount column; coerce and audit failures.
Row keys: BILL-2025000138, BILL-2025000118, BILL-2025000056
trap_id: b4e3e483fe

qty_received_ne_invoiced moderate material_misstatement cross_table purchase_orders.qty
PO qty inflated post-receipt; bills priced at receipt-qty mismatch.
Expected finding: Compare purchase_orders.qty to receipt records (when present).

trap_id: ce039f2a8b
price_invoiced_ne_po moderate material_misstatement cross_table purchase_orders.unit_price
PO unit price raised post-issuance vs. supporting invoice.

Row keys: PO-100074, PO-100025, PO-100014
trap_id: d087bd905c
approver_over_limit subtle control_weakness cross_table purchase_orders.total
PO total exceeds approver's authority limit.
Expected finding: Filter purchase_orders where total > approval_limit.

trap_id: e509152514
self_approval subtle control_weakness cross_column purchase_orders.approved_by

Expected finding: Filter purchase_orders where created_by == approved_by.

trap_id: b43d66eed9
workflow_override subtle control_weakness single_column ap_invoices.approval_flow

trap_id: 5f40e915f2
manual_je_no_supporting_doc moderate control_weakness single_column journal_entries.attachment_ref
Manual JE without attachment_ref.

trap_id: 17706a75ac
recurring_je_flagged_manual moderate control_weakness single_column journal_entries.je_type
Recurring monthly accrual posted as manual one-off (bypass-control signal).
Expected finding: Cluster JEs by memo+amount+account_id; flag repeated patterns posted with je_type='manual'.
Row keys: JE-2025000378, JE-2025001044, JE-2025000451
trap_id: 4626e72442
future_hire_date_active moderate control_weakness cross_column payroll_summary.hire_date
Active employee with hire_date in the future but YTD gross pay > 0.
Expected finding: Filter is_active=True AND hire_date > period_end AND ytd_gross_pay > 0.

trap_id: 18a2cbec00
duplicate_invoice_number_same_vendor moderate material_misstatement cross_column ap_invoices.invoice_number
Two bills with the same (vendor_id, invoice_number) — duplicate payment risk.
Expected finding: Group by (vendor_id, invoice_number); flag groups with >1 bill_id.
Row keys: BILL-2025000204, BILL-DUP-4575
trap_id: fafd744b90
duplicate_payment subtle material_misstatement cross_table ap_invoices.amount
Two bills same vendor + same date + same amount, different bill_id.
Expected finding: Group by (vendor_id, invoice_date, amount); flag groups with >1 bill_id.
Row keys: BILL-2025000138, BILL-DUPPAY-4411
trap_id: 168e1918d5
duplicate_customer moderate data_quality cross_column customers.tax_id
Two customer rows with identical tax_id and email.
Expected finding: Group customers by (tax_id) or (email); flag duplicates.
Row keys: CUST-00030, CUST-DUP-5554
trap_id: f8738162a1
re_keyed_invoice subtle control_weakness cross_table ar_invoices.invoice_id

Expected finding: Match voided invoices to subsequent same-day same-amount entries.
Row keys: INV-2025000026, INV-REKEY-1424
trap_id: 647dbc8a74
double_booked_revenue subtle material_misstatement cross_table pos_transactions.gross_amount

trap_id: c03c126d5b
triple_posted_je subtle data_quality cross_table journal_entries.entry_id
Same JE appearing 3× with sequential entry_ids.

trap_id: f423678291
zero_amount_open_invoice obvious data_quality single_column ap_invoices.amount

Expected finding: Filter ap_invoices where amount=0 AND status='open'.

trap_id: 43dfc89c12
negative_inventory obvious data_quality single_column inventory_items.on_hand_qty

dormant_account_activity moderate control_weakness cross_period chart_of_accounts.is_active

trap_id: bf86c82a8a

revenue_before_shipment subtle material_misstatement cross_table ar_invoices.shipment_date

trap_id: 7994a2ec15
revenue_after_period subtle material_misstatement cross_period ar_invoices.invoice_date

Expected finding: Filter ar_invoices where invoice_date > period_end.
Row keys: INV-2025000010, INV-2025000210
trap_id: e9104e76ac
inventory_in_transit_double_booked subtle material_misstatement cross_period inventory_items.status
Inventory marked in_transit AND included in on_hand_qty (FOB cutoff).

trap_id: 6fc92e182e
ap_cutoff_unaccrued subtle material_misstatement cross_period ap_invoices.invoice_date

Expected finding: Filter ap_invoices where invoice_date in [period_end-3, period_end] AND status='open'.
Row keys: BILL-2025000208, BILL-2025000009, BILL-2025000027
trap_id: f9307d8f07
bill_and_hold_no_docs subtle material_misstatement cross_column ar_invoices.memo
Revenue with bill-and-hold memo but no shipment.

Row keys: INV-2025000046, INV-2025000116
trap_id: dd21657eb8
side_letter_evidence subtle control_weakness single_column journal_entries.memo
Memo field references 'side letter' or 'verbal agreement'.

Row keys: JE-2025000642, JE-2025000446
trap_id: 6b8dec64e4
round_tripping subtle material_misstatement cross_table ap_invoices.amount
AR sale and AP purchase of identical amount with same counterparty within days.

trap_id: 4e60bcee51
round_dollar_terminated_user subtle material_misstatement cross_table journal_entries.posted_by
Round-dollar JEs near year-end posted by user whose termination_date precedes entry_date.

trap_id: 3179352034
new_vendor_paid_within_24h subtle control_weakness cross_table ap_invoices.vendor_id

Expected finding: Filter ap_invoices where date_diff(invoice_date, vendors.created_at) < 1 day.

trap_id: 275e9d7e6d
vendor_address_matches_employee subtle material_misstatement cross_table vendors.address_line_1
Vendor address matches an active employee's address (related-party risk).
Expected finding: Join vendors to payroll_summary on (address_line_1, city, state, zip_code).
Row keys: VEND-00028, EMP-00010
trap_id: c2600ceb1b
vendor_bank_matches_employee subtle material_misstatement cross_table vendors.bank_account_last4
Vendor bank account last4 matches an employee's payroll bank (kickback risk).
Expected finding: Inner-join vendors.bank_account_last4 to payroll_summary.bank_account_last4.
Row keys: VEND-00019, EMP-00016
trap_id: 990cb649f3
vendor_phone_matches_employee subtle control_weakness cross_table vendors.phone
Vendor phone matches employee phone.
Expected finding: Inner-join vendors.phone to payroll_summary.phone.
Row keys: VEND-00010, EMP-00019
trap_id: 29ce1b35eb
ghost_employee subtle material_misstatement cross_table payroll_summary.employee_id

trap_id: cc52757c55
phantom_inventory_in_transit subtle material_misstatement cross_period inventory_items.status

wrong_data_type moderate data_quality single_column ap_invoices.amount

unbalanced_je moderate control_weakness cross_column journal_entries.debit/credit

Expected finding: Group by entry_id; sum(debit) != sum(credit).
Row keys: JE-2025000632
trap_id: ab315b8343
subledger_to_gl_break moderate material_misstatement cross_table trial_balance.debit_balance
AR sub-ledger total ≠ AR control account balance.
Expected finding: Compare sum(ar_invoices.balance) to trial_balance.debit_balance where account_id=AR control.
Row keys: 1100
trap_id: 343ee66fdf
aging_sum_mismatch moderate control_weakness cross_column ar_aging.total
AR aging buckets don't sum to total.
Expected finding: Check current + d_1_30 + ... + over_90 == total.
Row keys: CUST-00361
trap_id: 1c31e38e4a
trial_balance_unbalanced obvious data_quality cross_table trial_balance.debit_balance
Sum of debit balances ≠ sum of credit balances.
Expected finding: Compute sum(debit_balance) - sum(credit_balance); flag if non-zero.
Row keys: 6500
trap_id: ed7e733787
bank_rec_unreconciled moderate control_weakness cross_table bank_statements.statement_balance
Bank statement closing balance doesn't match GL cash after outstanding items.
Expected finding: Reconcile bank_statements.statement_balance to trial_balance.debit_balance where account=Cash.
Row keys: 2025-12-31
trap_id: 948f0788a2
inventory_perpetual_vs_periodic moderate control_weakness cross_table inventory_items.on_hand_qty
Perpetual on_hand_qty has been adjusted; differs from physical count.
Expected finding: Compare inventory_items.on_hand_qty to historical receipt/issue activity.
Row keys: SKU-000140, SKU-000290, SKU-000531
trap_id: 9c43125230
fixed_asset_register_vs_gl moderate material_misstatement cross_table fixed_asset_register.net_book_value

Expected finding: Sum fixed_asset_register.net_book_value; compare to GL 1500−1510.
Row keys: FA-00031
trap_id: 8670150bf0
payroll_summary_vs_gl moderate control_weakness cross_table payroll_summary.ytd_gross_pay
Sum of YTD gross pay no longer matches GL salary expense.
Expected finding: Sum payroll_summary.ytd_gross_pay; compare to journal_entries.debit on salary accounts.
Row keys: EMP-00017
trap_id: 5fac83381e
ap_no_receipt moderate control_weakness cross_table ap_invoices.attachment_ref
Material AP invoices paid with no attached receiving document.
Expected finding: Filter ap_invoices.status='paid', amount>threshold, attachment_ref blank.
Row keys: BILL-2025000511, BILL-2025000689, BILL-2025001173
trap_id: a24e6d4635
qty_received_ne_invoiced moderate material_misstatement cross_table purchase_orders.qty

price_invoiced_ne_po moderate material_misstatement cross_table purchase_orders.unit_price

manual_je_no_supporting_doc moderate control_weakness single_column journal_entries.attachment_ref
Manual JE without attachment_ref.

trap_id: 0c890db57e
recurring_je_flagged_manual moderate control_weakness single_column journal_entries.je_type
Recurring monthly accrual posted as manual one-off (bypass-control signal).
Expected finding: Cluster JEs by memo+amount+account_id; flag repeated patterns posted with je_type='manual'.
Row keys: JE-2025002715, JE-2025001269, JE-2025002793
trap_id: c914c7be92
future_hire_date_active moderate control_weakness cross_column payroll_summary.hire_date
Active employee with hire_date in the future but YTD gross pay > 0.

Row keys: EMP-00057
trap_id: d5e74e1f63
duplicate_invoice_number_same_vendor moderate material_misstatement cross_column ap_invoices.invoice_number

Expected finding: Group by (vendor_id, invoice_number); flag groups with >1 bill_id.

trap_id: 8180058815
duplicate_customer moderate data_quality cross_column customers.tax_id
Two customer rows with identical tax_id and email.
Expected finding: Group customers by (tax_id) or (email); flag duplicates.
Row keys: CUST-00391, CUST-DUP-6299
trap_id: 797095d8c2
zero_amount_open_invoice obvious data_quality single_column ap_invoices.amount
AP invoice has zero amount but open status.
Expected finding: Filter ap_invoices where amount=0 AND status='open'.
Row keys: BILL-2025000013
trap_id: 10361b9402
negative_inventory obvious data_quality single_column inventory_items.on_hand_qty
Physical on-hand quantity is negative.
Expected finding: Filter inventory_items where on_hand_qty < 0.
Row keys: SKU-000168
trap_id: 9f81f7b3e1
dormant_account_activity moderate control_weakness cross_period chart_of_accounts.is_active
Account flagged inactive but has current-period JE activity.

Row keys: 1200
trap_id: 7ad1bcdd1f
sales_cutoff_spike moderate control_weakness cross_column ar_invoices.invoice_date
Concentrated, oversized invoices in final 3 days of FY.
Expected finding: Histogram invoice_date in last 5 days; compare amount to running median.
Row keys: INV-2025002068, INV-2025001073, INV-2025001567, INV-2025002172, INV-2025001938, INV-2025001072
trap_id: 1d46d6ebce
mixed_units moderate data_quality single_column inventory_items.unit

Expected finding: Inspect distinct values in inventory_items.unit.
Row keys: SKU-000359, SKU-000009, SKU-000036
trap_id: 8488f58969
wrong_data_type moderate data_quality single_column ap_invoices.amount
Amount column has string-typed values mixed with floats.
Expected finding: pd.to_numeric(errors='coerce'); flag NaN coercions.
Row keys: BILL-2025000939, BILL-2025000052, BILL-2025000422
trap_id: a2ef8dbd66
orphan_foreign_key moderate data_quality cross_table ar_invoices.customer_id
Invoice references a customer_id absent from customers.
Expected finding: Left-anti-join ar_invoices to customers on customer_id.
Row keys: INV-2025001751
trap_id: 29f3f122c1
cascading_invalidation moderate data_quality cross_table vendors.vendor_id

Row keys: VEND-00145
trap_id: 023aced036
mojibake_encoding moderate data_quality single_column vendors.vendor_name
Names contain mojibake (UTF-8 mis-decoded as latin-1).

Row keys: VEND-00033, VEND-00062, VEND-00127
trap_id: be21d99c34
column_shift_header_mismatch obvious data_quality single_column ap_invoices.invoice_date

Expected finding: Regex check ap_invoices.invoice_date against ^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$.
Row keys: BILL-2025000323
trap_id: c811c8f29f
embedded_delimiter moderate data_quality single_column vendors.vendor_name
Field contains a comma — survives via CSV quoting but breaks downstream non-quoting parsers.
Expected finding: Look for ',' in vendor_name; verify all CSV consumers honor RFC 4180 quoting.
Row keys: VEND-00069
trap_id: 54efe26f00
schema_drift_mid_file obvious data_quality single_column ap_invoices.drift_extra_col

Row keys: BILL-2025000616
trap_id: 4e762b3add
numeric_locale_leak moderate data_quality single_column ap_invoices.amount

trap_id: 2a8685bf75

duplicate_invoice_number_same_vendor moderate material_misstatement cross_column ap_invoices.invoice_number
Two bills with the same (vendor_id, invoice_number) — duplicate payment risk.
Expected finding: Group by (vendor_id, invoice_number); flag groups with >1 bill_id.
Row keys: BILL-2025000497, BILL-DUP-7554
trap_id: ce07c7be64
duplicate_payment subtle material_misstatement cross_table ap_invoices.amount
Two bills same vendor + same date + same amount, different bill_id.
Expected finding: Group by (vendor_id, invoice_date, amount); flag groups with >1 bill_id.
Row keys: BILL-2025000114, BILL-DUPPAY-1383
trap_id: 4068414ccc
duplicate_customer moderate data_quality cross_column customers.tax_id
Two customer rows with identical tax_id and email.
Expected finding: Group customers by (tax_id) or (email); flag duplicates.
Row keys: CUST-00283, CUST-DUP-5663
trap_id: 8d65cc3d08
re_keyed_invoice subtle control_weakness cross_table ar_invoices.invoice_id
Voided invoice re-entered under new number same day same amount.
Expected finding: Match voided invoices to subsequent same-day same-amount entries.
Row keys: INV-2025001294, INV-REKEY-5522
trap_id: 173160823a
double_booked_revenue subtle material_misstatement cross_table pos_transactions.gross_amount
Same revenue booked both in AR (invoice) and POS (txn).
Expected finding: Match ar_invoices to pos_transactions by date+amount; investigate ties.
Row keys: INV-2025000647, POS-DUP-1851
trap_id: 1b19407b33
triple_posted_je subtle data_quality cross_table journal_entries.entry_id
Same JE appearing 3× with sequential entry_ids.
Expected finding: Group by (entry_date, account_id, debit, credit); flag duplicates.
Row keys: JE-2025002022
trap_id: a598116b83
zero_amount_open_invoice obvious data_quality single_column ap_invoices.amount
AP invoice has zero amount but open status.
Expected finding: Filter ap_invoices where amount=0 AND status='open'.
Row keys: BILL-2025000834
trap_id: 9509994b1e
negative_inventory obvious data_quality single_column inventory_items.on_hand_qty
Physical on-hand quantity is negative.
Expected finding: Filter inventory_items where on_hand_qty < 0.
Row keys: SKU-000215
trap_id: 939cf8f6fd
phantom_asset_record subtle material_misstatement cross_table fixed_asset_register.asset_id
Asset in register with no matching purchase invoice / PO trail.
Expected finding: Left-join fixed_asset_register to ap_invoices on amount+date; flag orphans.
Row keys: FA-PHANTOM-712
trap_id: 5a9702f5ce
dormant_account_activity moderate control_weakness cross_period chart_of_accounts.is_active
Account flagged inactive but has current-period JE activity.
Expected finding: Left-join CoA.is_active=False to journal_entries; flag matches.
Row keys: 6300
trap_id: 7be81ab321
sales_cutoff_spike moderate control_weakness cross_column ar_invoices.invoice_date
Concentrated, oversized invoices in final 3 days of FY.
Expected finding: Histogram invoice_date in last 5 days; compare amount to running median.
Row keys: INV-2025001512, INV-2025002054, INV-2025001294, INV-2025002198, INV-2025001398, INV-2025000642
trap_id: 1d46d6ebce
revenue_before_shipment subtle material_misstatement cross_table ar_invoices.shipment_date
AR invoice dated before shipment_date — revenue booked pre-delivery.
Expected finding: Filter ar_invoices where invoice_date < shipment_date.
Row keys: INV-2025001293, INV-2025000749, INV-2025000033, INV-2025001478
trap_id: 219d80ba3f
revenue_after_period subtle material_misstatement cross_period ar_invoices.invoice_date
Invoice dated subsequent period but in current-period AR roll.
Expected finding: Filter ar_invoices where invoice_date > period_end.
Row keys: INV-2025000032, INV-2025002025
trap_id: ed6f610a45
inventory_in_transit_double_booked subtle material_misstatement cross_period inventory_items.status
Inventory marked in_transit AND included in on_hand_qty (FOB cutoff).
Expected finding: Filter inventory_items where status='in_transit' AND on_hand_qty > 0.
Row keys: SKU-000327, SKU-000373, SKU-000106
trap_id: d20652d665
ap_cutoff_unaccrued subtle material_misstatement cross_period ap_invoices.invoice_date
Bills dated immediately pre-cutoff still 'open' — likely unaccrued for AP.
Expected finding: Filter ap_invoices where invoice_date in [period_end-3, period_end] AND status='open'.
Row keys: BILL-2025000650, BILL-2025000978, BILL-2025000577
trap_id: 3e2d68c029
bill_and_hold_no_docs subtle material_misstatement cross_column ar_invoices.memo
Revenue with bill-and-hold memo but no shipment.
Expected finding: Filter ar_invoices where memo LIKE '%bill-and-hold%' AND shipment_date blank.
Row keys: INV-2025001234, INV-2025000801
trap_id: 11aec02468
side_letter_evidence subtle control_weakness single_column journal_entries.memo
Memo field references 'side letter' or 'verbal agreement'.
Expected finding: Regex search memo for 'side letter|verbal agreement|gentleman's agreement'.
Row keys: JE-2025003653, JE-2025002623
trap_id: 92b36bdb47
round_tripping subtle material_misstatement cross_table ap_invoices.amount
AR sale and AP purchase of identical amount with same counterparty within days.
Expected finding: Match ar_invoices to ap_invoices on (amount, week, customer/vendor sharing name).
Row keys: INV-2025001448, BILL-ROUNDTRIP-3952
trap_id: 001dd671dc
round_dollar_terminated_user subtle material_misstatement cross_table journal_entries.posted_by
Round-dollar JEs near year-end posted by user whose termination_date precedes entry_date.
Expected finding: Join journal_entries.posted_by==payroll_summary.username; flag entry_date > termination_date.
Row keys: JE-2025900000, JE-2025900001, JE-2025900002, JE-2025900003
trap_id: 1e85c2df4f
new_vendor_paid_within_24h subtle control_weakness cross_table ap_invoices.vendor_id
Vendor created and paid within 24 hours (control-weakness signal).
Expected finding: Filter ap_invoices where date_diff(invoice_date, vendors.created_at) < 1 day.
Row keys: VEND-FAST-001, BILL-FAST-001
trap_id: 4b43b8c5ce
vendor_address_matches_employee subtle material_misstatement cross_table vendors.address_line_1
Vendor address matches an active employee's address (related-party risk).
Expected finding: Join vendors to payroll_summary on (address_line_1, city, state, zip_code).
Row keys: VEND-00128, EMP-00043
trap_id: 5f5201f18d
vendor_bank_matches_employee subtle material_misstatement cross_table vendors.bank_account_last4
Vendor bank account last4 matches an employee's payroll bank (kickback risk).
Expected finding: Inner-join vendors.bank_account_last4 to payroll_summary.bank_account_last4.
Row keys: VEND-00041, EMP-00095
trap_id: 9944af8b79
vendor_phone_matches_employee subtle control_weakness cross_table vendors.phone
Vendor phone matches employee phone.
Expected finding: Inner-join vendors.phone to payroll_summary.phone.
Row keys: VEND-00068, EMP-00097
trap_id: cb77dd1491
ghost_employee subtle material_misstatement cross_table payroll_summary.employee_id
Active employee paid YTD with no journal_entries posting activity (posted_by) and no access logs.
Expected finding: Compare payroll_summary.employee_id to journal_entries.posted_by, system_access_logs.user_id.
Row keys: EMP-GHOST-01
trap_id: 8c9a2257ab
phantom_inventory_in_transit subtle material_misstatement cross_period inventory_items.status
SKUs flagged in_transit with last_received_date > 1 year ago.
Expected finding: Filter inventory_items.status='in_transit' AND date_diff(today, last_received_date) > 365.
Row keys: SKU-000125, SKU-000433, SKU-000041, SKU-000157, SKU-000263
trap_id: d39e1bd659
channel_stuffing_q4_returns_q1 subtle material_misstatement cross_period ar_invoices.amount
Q1 returns spike (negative-amount invoices) following Q4 sales surge.
Expected finding: Compare net AR by quarter; flag Q1 returns rate disproportionate to Q4 sales.
Row keys: INV-2025001406, INV-2025001011, INV-2025000557, INV-2025000477, INV-2025001046
trap_id: 870b5f0f4a
cookie_jar_reserve subtle material_misstatement cross_period journal_entries.memo
Allowance-for-doubtful adjustments oscillate quarterly in counter-cyclical pattern.
Expected finding: Track 1105 movements by quarter; flag oscillation signs alternating with no underlying AR trigger.
Row keys: JE-CJR-2025-03-31, JE-CJR-2025-06-30, JE-CJR-2025-09-30, JE-CJR-2025-12-31
trap_id: e2cb360e08
unusual_je_pair subtle control_weakness cross_column journal_entries.account_id
Debit/credit account-type pair (equity → revenue) never seen elsewhere in the ledger.
Expected finding: Build pair frequency of (debit_account_type, credit_account_type); flag low-frequency pairs.
Row keys: JE-UNUSUAL-3987
trap_id: d0b308cbc8
mixed_units moderate data_quality single_column inventory_items.unit
Same column has mixed units (ea/kg/lb/ml/oz).
Expected finding: Inspect distinct values in inventory_items.unit.
Row keys: SKU-000271, SKU-000288, SKU-000102
trap_id: 8488f58969
wrong_data_type moderate data_quality single_column ap_invoices.amount
Amount column has string-typed values mixed with floats.
Expected finding: pd.to_numeric(errors='coerce'); flag NaN coercions.
Row keys: BILL-2025000495, BILL-2025001043, BILL-2025000153
trap_id: a2ef8dbd66
orphan_foreign_key moderate data_quality cross_table ar_invoices.customer_id
Invoice references a customer_id absent from customers.
Expected finding: Left-anti-join ar_invoices to customers on customer_id.
Row keys: INV-2025001545
trap_id: a3faf16e00
cascading_invalidation moderate data_quality cross_table vendors.vendor_id
Vendor deleted from master but child bills remain referencing the orphaned vendor_id.
Expected finding: Left-anti-join ap_invoices to vendors on vendor_id.
Row keys: VEND-00145
trap_id: 023aced036
mojibake_encoding moderate data_quality single_column vendors.vendor_name
Names contain mojibake (UTF-8 mis-decoded as latin-1).
Expected finding: Detect characters in the 'Ã' range (0xC3xx) within ASCII-expected fields.
Row keys: VEND-00071, VEND-00081, VEND-00146
trap_id: be21d99c34
column_shift_header_mismatch obvious data_quality single_column ap_invoices.invoice_date
Invoice_date contains non-date data (column shift on import).
Expected finding: Regex check ap_invoices.invoice_date against ^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$.
Row keys: BILL-2025000750
trap_id: eccc643391
embedded_delimiter moderate data_quality single_column vendors.vendor_name
Field contains a comma — survives via CSV quoting but breaks downstream non-quoting parsers.
Expected finding: Look for ',' in vendor_name; verify all CSV consumers honor RFC 4180 quoting.
Row keys: VEND-00087
trap_id: 926205fd01
schema_drift_mid_file obvious data_quality single_column ap_invoices.drift_extra_col
Extra column appears in some rows only — schema drift signal.
Expected finding: Compare row column counts; flag rows with non-empty values in unexpected columns.
Row keys: BILL-2025000326
trap_id: 4e762b3add
numeric_locale_leak moderate data_quality single_column ap_invoices.amount
Some amounts formatted with thousand separators ('1,234.56'); others bare floats.
Expected finding: Detect non-numeric chars in amount column; coerce and audit failures.
Row keys: BILL-2025000414, BILL-2025000855, BILL-2025000136
trap_id: c9701e21a0
silent_record_truncation subtle material_misstatement cross_period ar_invoices
AR invoice export silently truncated; 121 rows missing vs. control total.
Expected finding: Compare row count + sum(amount) to source-system control totals.
Row keys: INV-2025002281, INV-2025002282, INV-2025002283, INV-2025002284, INV-2025002285
trap_id: ac6625d8d1

Expected finding: Filter vendors where country is set and state or zip_code is blank.

trap_id: 1b8b9cff68
future_dated_entry obvious data_quality single_column journal_entries.entry_date
JE dated after fiscal-year end.
Expected finding: Filter journal_entries where entry_date > period_end.

trap_id: bf52d54851
due_before_invoice obvious data_quality single_column ar_invoices.due_date
Invoice due_date precedes invoice_date.
Expected finding: Filter ar_invoices where due_date < invoice_date.
Row keys: INV-2025000302
trap_id: 2be26176bc
negative_debit_or_credit obvious data_quality single_column journal_entries.debit

Expected finding: Flag debit < 0 in journal_entries.
Row keys: JE-2025000870
trap_id: d951e67272
trial_balance_unbalanced obvious data_quality cross_table trial_balance.debit_balance
Sum of debit balances ≠ sum of credit balances.

trap_id: 0ba0317d6d
zero_amount_open_invoice obvious data_quality single_column ap_invoices.amount

trap_id: 8612d6ef52
negative_inventory obvious data_quality single_column inventory_items.on_hand_qty

Expected finding: Filter inventory_items where on_hand_qty < 0.

trap_id: e3645dd0a6
column_shift_header_mismatch obvious data_quality single_column ap_invoices.invoice_date

Row keys: BILL-2025000036
trap_id: 126c2e98b3
schema_drift_mid_file obvious data_quality single_column ap_invoices.drift_extra_col

Expected finding: Compare row column counts; flag rows with non-empty values in unexpected columns.
Row keys: BILL-2025000041

trap_id: 3f134c45d5
sign_flip_credit_as_negative_debit moderate data_quality cross_column journal_entries.debit

trap_id: 17e06e6fe5

posted_at_unusual_hour subtle control_weakness cross_column journal_entries.posted_at
Interactive-user JE posted between 02:00 and 05:00 local time.
Expected finding: Extract hour from posted_at; flag 02:00–05:00 except 'system_batch' user.
Row keys: JE-2025000777, JE-2025000418, JE-2025001051, JE-2025000472
trap_id: 3ed3803bce
negative_debit_or_credit obvious data_quality single_column journal_entries.debit
Debit amount is negative.
Expected finding: Flag debit < 0 in journal_entries.
Row keys: JE-2025000242
trap_id: 7902193d3e
currency_mixing_unconverted moderate material_misstatement cross_column ar_invoices.currency
EUR-denominated invoices mixed with USD; amounts not converted.
Expected finding: Group ar_invoices by currency; flag any non-base currency without FX adjustment.
Row keys: INV-2025000166, INV-2025000081, INV-2025000074, INV-2025000350, INV-2025000227
trap_id: ef0f070905
implied_decimal_cents_vs_dollars subtle material_misstatement single_column ap_invoices.amount
Some bills stored in cents not dollars; silent 100× overstatement.
Expected finding: Histogram bill amounts on log scale; flag rows in a 100× outlier band.
Row keys: BILL-2025000117, BILL-2025000029, BILL-2025000012
trap_id: 157cf045c2
comma_decimal_european moderate data_quality single_column ap_invoices.invoice_number
Invoice references use comma-as-decimal alongside dot-as-decimal.
Expected finding: Detect ',' in invoice_number followed by 2 digits.
Row keys: BILL-2025000109, BILL-2025000055, BILL-2025000128
trap_id: b2ac29a3f1
scientific_notation_leak moderate data_quality single_column ap_invoices.invoice_number
Numeric-looking string fields contain scientific notation.
Expected finding: Regex check for E+/E- in string columns.
Row keys: BILL-2025000084, BILL-2025000073
trap_id: 3f134c45d5
round_dollar_concentration subtle control_weakness single_column journal_entries.debit
Cluster of JE amounts at $10k/$25k/$50k boundaries.
Expected finding: Histogram debit/credit amounts modulo 1000; flag spikes at round values.
Row keys: JE-2025000451, JE-2025000143, JE-2025000456, JE-2025000829, JE-2025000023
trap_id: 9bcedbb5be
materiality_threshold_gaming subtle control_weakness single_column ap_invoices.amount
Bills clustered just under the $5,000 approval threshold.
Expected finding: Histogram amounts in the $4,000–$5,000 band; flag concentration just under thresholds.
Row keys: BILL-2025000103, BILL-2025000117, BILL-2025000149, BILL-2025000120, BILL-2025000226
trap_id: d7afa380b8
truncation_rounding_drift subtle material_misstatement cross_period journal_entries.debit

Expected finding: Compare sum(debit)-sum(credit) across all JE rows; flag non-zero residual.
Row keys: JE-2025000584, JE-2025001115, JE-2025000054
trap_id: 0e065d406c
sign_flip_credit_as_negative_debit moderate data_quality cross_column journal_entries.debit
Credit posted as negative debit instead of positive credit; nets correctly but inflates row count.
Expected finding: Identify journal_entries.debit < 0 paired with same-amount positive credit elsewhere.
Row keys: JE-2025000825R
trap_id: b064af6e38
unbalanced_je moderate control_weakness cross_column journal_entries.debit/credit

Expected finding: Group by entry_id; sum(debit) != sum(credit).
Row keys: JE-2025000042
trap_id: efff8a8c23
subledger_to_gl_break moderate material_misstatement cross_table trial_balance.debit_balance
AR sub-ledger total ≠ AR control account balance.
Expected finding: Compare sum(ar_invoices.balance) to trial_balance.debit_balance where account_id=AR control.

trap_id: 8936358346
aging_sum_mismatch moderate control_weakness cross_column ar_aging.total

trap_id: d94c4e0b80
trial_balance_unbalanced obvious data_quality cross_table trial_balance.debit_balance

Row keys: 1000
trap_id: 7ca5c9c69f
inventory_perpetual_vs_periodic moderate control_weakness cross_table inventory_items.on_hand_qty

Expected finding: Compare inventory_items.on_hand_qty to historical receipt/issue activity.

payroll_summary_vs_gl moderate control_weakness cross_table payroll_summary.ytd_gross_pay

trap_id: 56bb4e8170
intercompany_not_eliminated subtle material_misstatement cross_table journal_entries.memo

trap_id: 1c962ebd78
ap_no_receipt moderate control_weakness cross_table ap_invoices.attachment_ref

future_hire_date_active moderate control_weakness cross_column payroll_summary.hire_date

vendor_bank_matches_employee subtle material_misstatement cross_table vendors.bank_account_last4

Row keys: JE-2025002627R
trap_id: 1e54c61ce5
unbalanced_je moderate control_weakness cross_column journal_entries.debit/credit
Debit and credit legs of an entry_id don't tie.
Expected finding: Group by entry_id; sum(debit) != sum(credit).
Row keys: JE-2025002223
trap_id: 339f63a5c2
subledger_to_gl_break moderate material_misstatement cross_table trial_balance.debit_balance
AR sub-ledger total ≠ AR control account balance.
Expected finding: Compare sum(ar_invoices.balance) to trial_balance.debit_balance where account_id=AR control.
Row keys: 1100
trap_id: 01e3eca38a
aging_sum_mismatch moderate control_weakness cross_column ar_aging.total
AR aging buckets don't sum to total.

Row keys: CUST-00058
trap_id: 1ad5aba73a
restated_beginning_balance subtle material_misstatement cross_period prior_period_restatement.restated
Prior-period restatement not reflected in current opening balance.

Row keys: 2500
trap_id: 82e5cd8841
trial_balance_unbalanced obvious data_quality cross_table trial_balance.debit_balance
Sum of debit balances ≠ sum of credit balances.

Row keys: 6200
trap_id: 5701762d51
bank_rec_unreconciled moderate control_weakness cross_table bank_statements.statement_balance

Row keys: 2025-12-31
trap_id: 4e6f39bad6
inventory_perpetual_vs_periodic moderate control_weakness cross_table inventory_items.on_hand_qty

trap_id: e61ff48722
fixed_asset_register_vs_gl moderate material_misstatement cross_table fixed_asset_register.net_book_value

Expected finding: Sum fixed_asset_register.net_book_value; compare to GL 1500−1510.
Row keys: FA-00056
trap_id: 87adbc07a4
payroll_summary_vs_gl moderate control_weakness cross_table payroll_summary.ytd_gross_pay

Expected finding: Sum payroll_summary.ytd_gross_pay; compare to journal_entries.debit on salary accounts.
Row keys: EMP-00046
trap_id: 424fc8d0a1
intercompany_not_eliminated subtle material_misstatement cross_table journal_entries.memo
Intercompany-tagged entries without offsetting eliminations.

Row keys: JE-2025003736, JE-2025003823, JE-2025000469
trap_id: ded1c6c5ce
deferred_revenue_waterfall_break subtle material_misstatement cross_period deferred_revenue_waterfall.closing_balance
Closing balance ≠ opening + new − recognized.

Row keys: 2025-07-01
trap_id: a325acc520
ap_no_receipt moderate control_weakness cross_table ap_invoices.attachment_ref
Material AP invoices paid with no attached receiving document.

trap_id: 4c6ca9c521
qty_received_ne_invoiced moderate material_misstatement cross_table purchase_orders.qty

price_invoiced_ne_po moderate material_misstatement cross_table purchase_orders.unit_price

self_approval subtle control_weakness cross_column purchase_orders.approved_by

trap_id: 3debb866c4
future_hire_date_active moderate control_weakness cross_column payroll_summary.hire_date

trap_id: f5512442fe

duplicate_payment subtle material_misstatement cross_table ap_invoices.amount

Row keys: BILL-2025000894, BILL-DUPPAY-8668
trap_id: c97fae757b
duplicate_customer moderate data_quality cross_column customers.tax_id

Expected finding: Group customers by (tax_id) or (email); flag duplicates.
Row keys: CUST-00321, CUST-DUP-6910
trap_id: 95fd2c5a3b
re_keyed_invoice subtle control_weakness cross_table ar_invoices.invoice_id

triple_posted_je subtle data_quality cross_table journal_entries.entry_id

Row keys: JE-2025001787
trap_id: f3dae97f91

Row keys: BILL-2025000987

Expected finding: Filter inventory_items where on_hand_qty < 0.

trap_id: 15c0b9a6ad

dormant_account_activity moderate control_weakness cross_period chart_of_accounts.is_active

trap_id: fb5c331aa7

trap_id: 5e48c03413
inventory_in_transit_double_booked subtle material_misstatement cross_period inventory_items.status
Inventory marked in_transit AND included in on_hand_qty (FOB cutoff).

Row keys: BILL-2025000697, BILL-2025000628, BILL-2025000130

vendor_bank_matches_employee subtle material_misstatement cross_table vendors.bank_account_last4

Row keys: VEND-00055

mojibake_encoding moderate data_quality single_column vendors.vendor_name

trap_id: a75078c1c4
embedded_delimiter moderate data_quality single_column vendors.vendor_name
