Compare row column counts; flag rows with non-empty values in unexpected columns. healthcare/basic/L1, healthcare/basic/L2, healthcare/basic/L3, healthcare/big/L1, healthcare/big/L2, healthcare/big/L3, manufacturing/basic/L1, manufacturing/basic/L2, manufacturing/basic/L3, manufacturing/big/L1, manufacturing/big/L2, manufacturing/big/L3, retail/basic/L1, retail/basic/L2, retail/basic/L3, retail/big/L1, retail/big/L2, retail/big/L3, saas/basic/L1, saas/basic/L2, saas/basic/L3, saas/big/L1, saas/big/L2, saas/big/L3
trial_balance_unbalanced obvious data_quality cross_table Sum of debit balances ≠ sum of credit balances. Compute sum(debit_balance) - sum(credit_balance); flag if non-zero. healthcare/basic/L1, healthcare/basic/L2, healthcare/basic/L3, healthcare/big/L1, healthcare/big/L2, healthcare/big/L3, healthcare/minimal/L1, healthcare/minimal/L2, healthcare/minimal/L3, manufacturing/basic/L1, manufacturing/basic/L2, manufacturing/basic/L3, manufacturing/big/L1, manufacturing/big/L2, manufacturing/big/L3, manufacturing/minimal/L1, manufacturing/minimal/L2, manufacturing/minimal/L3, retail/basic/L1, retail/basic/L2, retail/basic/L3, retail/big/L1, retail/big/L2, retail/big/L3, retail/minimal/L1, retail/minimal/L2, retail/minimal/L3, saas/basic/L1, saas/basic/L2, saas/basic/L3, saas/big/L1, saas/big/L2, saas/big/L3, saas/minimal/L1, saas/minimal/L2, saas/minimal/L3
zero_amount_open_invoice obvious data_quality single_column AP invoice has zero amount but open status. Filter ap_invoices where amount=0 AND status='open'. healthcare/basic/L1, healthcare/basic/L2, healthcare/basic/L3, healthcare/big/L1, healthcare/big/L2, healthcare/big/L3, manufacturing/basic/L1, manufacturing/basic/L2, manufacturing/basic/L3, manufacturing/big/L1, manufacturing/big/L2, manufacturing/big/L3, retail/basic/L1, retail/basic/L2, retail/basic/L3, retail/big/L1, retail/big/L2, retail/big/L3, saas/basic/L1, saas/basic/L2, saas/basic/L3, saas/big/L1, saas/big/L2, saas/big/L3
ap_cutoff_unaccrued subtle material_misstatement cross_period Bills dated immediately pre-cutoff still 'open' — likely unaccrued for AP. Filter ap_invoices where invoice_date in [period_end-3, period_end] AND status='open'. healthcare/basic/L3, healthcare/big/L3, manufacturing/basic/L3, manufacturing/big/L3, retail/basic/L3, retail/big/L3, saas/basic/L3, saas/big/L3
approver_over_limit subtle control_weakness cross_table PO total exceeds approver's authority limit. Filter purchase_orders where total > approval_limit. healthcare/basic/L3, healthcare/big/L3, manufacturing/basic/L3, manufacturing/big/L3, retail/basic/L3, retail/big/L3, saas/basic/L3, saas/big/L3
bill_and_hold_no_docs subtle material_misstatement cross_column Revenue with bill-and-hold memo but no shipment. Filter ar_invoices where memo LIKE '%bill-and-hold%' AND shipment_date blank. healthcare/basic/L3, healthcare/big/L3, manufacturing/basic/L3, manufacturing/big/L3, retail/basic/L3, retail/big/L3, saas/basic/L3, saas/big/L3
channel_stuffing_q4_returns_q1 subtle material_misstatement cross_period Q1 returns spike (negative-amount invoices) following Q4 sales surge. Compare net AR by quarter; flag Q1 returns rate disproportionate to Q4 sales. healthcare/basic/L3, healthcare/big/L3, manufacturing/basic/L3, manufacturing/big/L3, retail/basic/L3, retail/big/L3, saas/basic/L3, saas/big/L3
confidential_masked_name subtle control_weakness cross_table Multiple vendor rows masked as 'Confidential' — hides related-party patterns. Filter vendors where vendor_name in {'Confidential','Vendor #1',...}; cross-join to ap_invoices for activity. healthcare/basic/L3, healthcare/big/L3, manufacturing/basic/L3, manufacturing/big/L3, retail/basic/L3, retail/big/L3, saas/basic/L3, saas/big/L3
contractual_allowance_q4_drop subtle material_misstatement cross_period Q4 allowed/billed ratio jumps relative to Q1–Q3 baseline. Compare allowed/billed ratio quarterly; flag Q4 outliers. healthcare/basic/L3, healthcare/big/L3
cookie_jar_reserve subtle material_misstatement cross_period Allowance-for-doubtful adjustments oscillate quarterly in counter-cyclical pattern. Track 1105 movements by quarter; flag oscillation signs alternating with no underlying AR trigger. healthcare/basic/L3, healthcare/big/L3, healthcare/minimal/L3, manufacturing/basic/L3, manufacturing/big/L3, manufacturing/minimal/L3, retail/basic/L3, retail/big/L3, retail/minimal/L3, saas/basic/L3, saas/big/L3, saas/minimal/L3
deferred_revenue_waterfall_break subtle material_misstatement cross_period Closing balance ≠ opening + new − recognized. Recompute closing per row; flag mismatches. saas/basic/L3, saas/big/L3
double_booked_revenue subtle material_misstatement cross_table Same revenue booked both in AR (invoice) and POS (txn). Match ar_invoices to pos_transactions by date+amount; investigate ties. retail/basic/L3, retail/big/L3
duplicate_payment subtle material_misstatement cross_table Two bills same vendor + same date + same amount, different bill_id. Group by (vendor_id, invoice_date, amount); flag groups with >1 bill_id. healthcare/basic/L3, healthcare/big/L3, manufacturing/basic/L3, manufacturing/big/L3, retail/basic/L3, retail/big/L3, saas/basic/L3, saas/big/L3
ghost_employee subtle material_misstatement cross_table Active employee paid YTD with no journal_entries posting activity (posted_by) and no access logs. Compare payroll_summary.employee_id to journal_entries.posted_by, system_access_logs.user_id. healthcare/basic/L3, healthcare/big/L3, manufacturing/basic/L3, manufacturing/big/L3, retail/basic/L3, retail/big/L3, saas/basic/L3, saas/big/L3
implied_decimal_cents_vs_dollars subtle material_misstatement single_column Some bills stored in cents not dollars; silent 100× overstatement. Histogram bill amounts on log scale; flag rows in a 100× outlier band. healthcare/basic/L3, healthcare/big/L3, manufacturing/basic/L3, manufacturing/big/L3, retail/basic/L3, retail/big/L3, saas/basic/L3, saas/big/L3
intercompany_not_eliminated subtle material_misstatement cross_table Intercompany-tagged entries without offsetting eliminations. Filter journal_entries memo LIKE 'Intercompany%'; check for offsetting elimination row per entry. healthcare/basic/L3, healthcare/big/L3, healthcare/minimal/L3, manufacturing/basic/L3, manufacturing/big/L3, manufacturing/minimal/L3, retail/basic/L3, retail/big/L3, retail/minimal/L3, saas/basic/L3, saas/big/L3, saas/minimal/L3
inventory_in_transit_double_booked subtle material_misstatement cross_period Inventory marked in_transit AND included in on_hand_qty (FOB cutoff). Filter inventory_items where status='in_transit' AND on_hand_qty > 0. healthcare/basic/L3, healthcare/big/L3, manufacturing/basic/L3, manufacturing/big/L3, retail/basic/L3, retail/big/L3, saas/basic/L3, saas/big/L3
materiality_threshold_gaming subtle control_weakness single_column Bills clustered just under the $5,000 approval threshold. Histogram amounts in the $4,000–$5,000 band; flag concentration just under thresholds. healthcare/basic/L3, healthcare/big/L3, manufacturing/basic/L3, manufacturing/big/L3, retail/basic/L3, retail/big/L3, saas/basic/L3, saas/big/L3
mm_dd_vs_dd_mm_collision subtle material_misstatement single_column DD/MM/YYYY-formatted dates mixed with MM/DD/YYYY; ambiguous interpretation. Detect non-ISO date strings; cross-check against vendor/customer locale. healthcare/basic/L3, healthcare/big/L3, manufacturing/basic/L3, manufacturing/big/L3, retail/basic/L3, retail/big/L3, saas/basic/L3, saas/big/L3
new_vendor_paid_within_24h subtle control_weakness cross_table Vendor created and paid within 24 hours (control-weakness signal). Filter ap_invoices where date_diff(invoice_date, vendors.created_at) < 1 day. healthcare/basic/L3, healthcare/big/L3, manufacturing/basic/L3, manufacturing/big/L3, retail/basic/L3, retail/big/L3, saas/basic/L3, saas/big/L3
phantom_asset_record subtle material_misstatement cross_table Asset in register with no matching purchase invoice / PO trail. Left-join fixed_asset_register to ap_invoices on amount+date; flag orphans. healthcare/big/L3, manufacturing/big/L3, retail/big/L3, saas/big/L3
phantom_inventory_in_transit subtle material_misstatement cross_period SKUs flagged in_transit with last_received_date > 1 year ago. Filter inventory_items.status='in_transit' AND date_diff(today, last_received_date) > 365. healthcare/basic/L3, healthcare/big/L3, manufacturing/basic/L3, manufacturing/big/L3, retail/basic/L3, retail/big/L3, saas/basic/L3, saas/big/L3
posted_at_unusual_hour subtle control_weakness cross_column Interactive-user JE posted between 02:00 and 05:00 local time. Extract hour from posted_at; flag 02:00–05:00 except 'system_batch' user. healthcare/basic/L3, healthcare/big/L3, healthcare/minimal/L3, manufacturing/basic/L3, manufacturing/big/L3, manufacturing/minimal/L3, retail/basic/L3, retail/big/L3, retail/minimal/L3, saas/basic/L3, saas/big/L3, saas/minimal/L3
re_keyed_invoice subtle control_weakness cross_table Voided invoice re-entered under new number same day same amount. Match voided invoices to subsequent same-day same-amount entries. healthcare/basic/L3, healthcare/big/L3, manufacturing/basic/L3, manufacturing/big/L3, retail/basic/L3, retail/big/L3, saas/basic/L3, saas/big/L3
restated_beginning_balance subtle material_misstatement cross_period Prior-period restatement not reflected in current opening balance. Recompute opening = restated; compare to derived opening from current TB + JEs. healthcare/big/L3, manufacturing/big/L3, retail/big/L3, saas/big/L3
revenue_after_period subtle material_misstatement cross_period Invoice dated subsequent period but in current-period AR roll. Filter ar_invoices where invoice_date > period_end. healthcare/basic/L3, healthcare/big/L3, manufacturing/basic/L3, manufacturing/big/L3, retail/basic/L3, retail/big/L3, saas/basic/L3, saas/big/L3
revenue_before_shipment subtle material_misstatement cross_table AR invoice dated before shipment_date — revenue booked pre-delivery. Filter ar_invoices where invoice_date < shipment_date. healthcare/basic/L3, healthcare/big/L3, manufacturing/basic/L3, manufacturing/big/L3, retail/basic/L3, retail/big/L3, saas/basic/L3, saas/big/L3
round_dollar_concentration subtle control_weakness single_column Cluster of JE amounts at $10k/$25k/$50k boundaries. Histogram debit/credit amounts modulo 1000; flag spikes at round values. healthcare/basic/L3, healthcare/big/L3, healthcare/minimal/L3, manufacturing/basic/L3, manufacturing/big/L3, manufacturing/minimal/L3, retail/basic/L3, retail/big/L3, retail/minimal/L3, saas/basic/L3, saas/big/L3, saas/minimal/L3
round_dollar_terminated_user subtle material_misstatement cross_table Round-dollar JEs near year-end posted by user whose termination_date precedes entry_date. Join journal_entries.posted_by==payroll_summary.username; flag entry_date > termination_date. healthcare/basic/L3, healthcare/big/L3, manufacturing/basic/L3, manufacturing/big/L3, retail/basic/L3, retail/big/L3, saas/basic/L3, saas/big/L3
round_tripping subtle material_misstatement cross_table AR sale and AP purchase of identical amount with same counterparty within days. Match ar_invoices to ap_invoices on (amount, week, customer/vendor sharing name). healthcare/basic/L3, healthcare/big/L3, manufacturing/basic/L3, manufacturing/big/L3, retail/basic/L3, retail/big/L3, saas/basic/L3, saas/big/L3
same_entity_split_ids subtle control_weakness cross_column Two distinct vendor_ids share identical tax_id (same real-world entity). Group vendors by tax_id; flag groups with >1 vendor_id. healthcare/basic/L3, healthcare/big/L3, manufacturing/basic/L3, manufacturing/big/L3, retail/basic/L3, retail/big/L3, saas/basic/L3, saas/big/L3
self_approval subtle control_weakness cross_column Same user created and approved the PO. Filter purchase_orders where created_by == approved_by. healthcare/basic/L3, healthcare/big/L3, manufacturing/basic/L3, manufacturing/big/L3, retail/basic/L3, retail/big/L3, saas/basic/L3, saas/big/L3
side_letter_evidence subtle control_weakness single_column Memo field references 'side letter' or 'verbal agreement'. Regex search memo for 'side letter|verbal agreement|gentleman's agreement'. healthcare/basic/L3, healthcare/big/L3, healthcare/minimal/L3, manufacturing/basic/L3, manufacturing/big/L3, manufacturing/minimal/L3, retail/basic/L3, retail/big/L3, retail/minimal/L3, saas/basic/L3, saas/big/L3, saas/minimal/L3
silent_record_truncation subtle material_misstatement cross_period AR invoice export silently truncated; 21 rows missing vs. control total. Compare row count + sum(amount) to source-system control totals. healthcare/basic/L3, healthcare/big/L3, manufacturing/basic/L3, manufacturing/big/L3, retail/basic/L3, retail/big/L3, saas/basic/L3, saas/big/L3
subscription_service_period_in_next_fy subtle material_misstatement cross_period Subscription invoiced FY25 but service period entirely in FY26. Filter subscriptions where start_date > period_end. saas/basic/L3, saas/big/L3
triple_posted_je subtle data_quality cross_table Same JE appearing 3× with sequential entry_ids. truncated_description subtle data_quality single_column Multiple distinct rows share the same 19-character description — silent fixed-width truncation. Group attachment_ref by length; flag identical-length collisions across distinct rows. healthcare/basic/L3, healthcare/big/L3, manufacturing/basic/L3, manufacturing/big/L3, retail/basic/L3, retail/big/L3, saas/basic/L3, saas/big/L3
truncation_rounding_drift subtle material_misstatement cross_period Half-cent drift accumulates across months. Compare sum(debit)-sum(credit) across all JE rows; flag non-zero residual. healthcare/basic/L3, healthcare/big/L3, healthcare/minimal/L3, manufacturing/basic/L3, manufacturing/big/L3, manufacturing/minimal/L3, retail/basic/L3, retail/big/L3, retail/minimal/L3, saas/basic/L3, saas/big/L3, saas/minimal/L3
unicode_homoglyphs subtle control_weakness single_column Cyrillic homoglyph substituted in vendor name (sanctions-screening bypass). unusual_je_pair subtle control_weakness cross_column Debit/credit account-type pair (equity → revenue) never seen elsewhere in the ledger. vendor_address_matches_employee subtle material_misstatement cross_table Vendor address matches an active employee's address (related-party risk). vendor_bank_matches_employee subtle material_misstatement cross_table Vendor bank account last4 matches an employee's payroll bank (kickback risk). weekend_holiday_posting subtle control_weakness cross_column Material JEs posted on US federal holidays. Join entry_date to a holiday calendar; flag posted_at on those dates. healthcare/basic/L3, healthcare/big/L3, healthcare/minimal/L3, manufacturing/basic/L3, manufacturing/big/L3, manufacturing/minimal/L3, retail/basic/L3, retail/big/L3, retail/minimal/L3, saas/basic/L3, saas/big/L3, saas/minimal/L3
workflow_override subtle control_weakness single_column Bills approved via manual_override workflow. Filter ap_invoices where approval_flow != 'standard'. healthcare/basic/L3, healthcare/big/L3, manufacturing/basic/L3, manufacturing/big/L3, retail/basic/L3, retail/big/L3, saas/basic/L3, saas/big/L3
